fields.name: offer_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this pre-approved credit offer, issued by marketing

fields.name: customer_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the customer to whom the offer is directed

fields.name: offer_type
fields.description: Classification of the offer; indicates this is a pre-approved credit product

fields.name: department_from
fields.description: Originating department that created and sent the offer

fields.name: department_to
fields.description: Destination department responsible for credit review and approval

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the offer was generated and transmitted

fields.name: customer_details
fields.description: Personal and contact information for the customer

children.name: first_name
children.description: Customer's given name

children.name: last_name
children.description: Customer's family name

children.name: email
children.description: Customer's email address for offer communication

children.name: phone
children.description: Customer's telephone number for contact purposes

children.name: account_number
children.description: Customer's existing bank account number

fields.name: credit_offer
fields.description: Terms and financial details of the credit product being offered

children.name: product_type
children.description: Type of credit product offered

children.name: offer_amount
children.description: Principal amount of credit being offered to the customer

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the offer amount

children.name: interest_rate
children.description: Annual percentage rate (APR) applicable to the loan

children.name: term_months
children.description: Loan repayment period in months

children.name: monthly_payment
children.description: Fixed monthly payment amount required from the customer

children.name: total_repayable
children.description: Total amount to be repaid over the loan term, including principal and interest

fields.name: offer_validity
fields.description: Time window during which the customer may accept the offer

children.name: start_date
children.description: Date on which the offer becomes valid

children.name: end_date
children.description: Date on which the offer expires and is no longer valid

children.name: days_valid
children.description: Number of calendar days the offer remains valid

fields.name: eligibility_criteria
fields.description: Minimum requirements the customer must meet to qualify for the offer

children.name: credit_score_required
children.description: Minimum credit score threshold required for eligibility

children.name: annual_income_required
children.description: Minimum annual income threshold required for eligibility

children.name: employment_status
children.description: Required employment status for the customer to qualify

children.name: existing_customer
children.description: Whether the customer must be an existing bank customer to qualify

fields.name: marketing_campaign
fields.description: Campaign metadata indicating the marketing initiative under which this offer was generated

children.name: campaign_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the marketing campaign

children.name: campaign_name
children.description: Human-readable name of the marketing campaign

children.name: channel
children.description: Communication channel through which the offer will be delivered

children.name: segment
children.description: Customer segment targeted by this campaign

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the offer in the approval workflow; indicates it awaits credit department review

fields.name: approval_required
fields.description: Flag indicating whether credit department approval is required before the offer can be extended to the customer
